one_line_verdict: Best suited for true-crime and mystery fans — this intimate documentary thriller works fine on streaming; skipping the theater is totally justified.
english_note: Conversational dialogue, no heavy accents or jargon; easy to follow for most viewers.
credits_detail: No credits scene — no need to stay after the film ends. (Speculative based on genre norms for indie documentary thrillers.)
one_line_summary: A filmmaker's obsessive 23-year hunt for her missing brother makes for a gripping, intimate indie mystery.
